title: Show "Description" in the host list
author: av2k
body_snippet:
Show "Description" text in the host list

## Expected Behavior
The Description text should (optionally) show up in the host list next to or below the host name. 

## Current Behavior
The host list pane doesn't show the description.

## Possible Solution
Show the Description text, either in full or the first X letters, in the host list pane. See the attached image, proposed display in red.

## Context
When managing a large number of switches in several buildings, it's useful to add th...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Feature request to display the Description field as a visible column in the connection list panel, which is a reasonable UX enhancement already acknowledged by maintainer as planned.
Approach: Add Description as an optional visible column in the connection list/tree view, similar to how other connection properties are displayed
